item.title: Download NWinfo 1.6.1
item.description: NWinfo is a Win32 program that allows you to obtain system and hardware information. It displays essential information about CPU, memory, disk, network, and even system operating details. Because it's portable, you can carry NWinfo on a USB stick and use it on any Windows machine, making it a useful tool for both tech enthusiasts and troubleshooters. Features of NWinfo Get detailed information about SMBIOS, CPUID, S.M.A.R.T., PCI, EDID, etc. Supports export in JSON, YAML and LUA...

item.title: Download POPcon PRO 4.9.9
item.description: POPcon PRO connects your MS Exchange server to POP3 and IMAP mailboxes. It includes all the features of the POPcon Standard version plus antivirus, anti-spam, and rule-based delivery functionality. POPcon PRO downloads emails from POP3, POP3-SSL, IMAP, and IMAP-SSL mailboxes and distributes them to Exchange or Domino mailboxes based on recipient information found in the email header. The software runs as a background service on any Windows Server version compatible with .NET 4.7.2...
